# Samrat Mallick - Full Stack Web Developer

## Overview
Welcome to the portfolio of Samrat Mallick. I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in building dynamic and responsive web applications using modern technologies like React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB (MERN stack). I love turning ideas into reality using code and creating innovative web solutions.

## Skills
- Frontend Development: ReactJS, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, JavaScript, TypeScript
- Backend Development: NodeJS, ExpressJS, RESTful APIs
- Database: MongoDB, Mongoose
- Tools: Git, VS Code, Postman, Vercel, Render

## Services
- Full Stack Web Development
- Frontend Development (React)
- Backend Development (Node.js/Express)
- API Integration & Development
- Database Management (MongoDB)
